message:
Command `# FOUND IT! OpenROAD PID 141328 is running Global Routing (grt.tcl)!
# 99.9% CPU, 23.8% memory (1.9GB RAM) - this is ACTIVELY RUNNING!
# 82 minutes of CPU time so far on this step.
# The GRT is running but writing to the step's log file buffered.
# This is the REAL second GRT pass (DRT via TritonRoute follows after GRT).
# Let's check the actual GRT progress

# Check if any output is appearing in the step log file now
sleep 120
wc -c /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/openroad-globalrouting.log 2>/dev/null
ps -p 141328 -o pid,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
tail -3 /tmp/pnr_v4.log` executed with exit code 0.
